reason: Video contains only head-and-shoulders footage of a person in surgical attire speaking to camera. No FLS task equipment, trainer box, instruments, or procedural content is visible. This appears to be introductory/promotional content or lecture material without any hands-on task performance.
frame_evidence: All 25 frames show identical framing: speaker's face/upper torso against neutral background with World Laparoscopy Hospital branding visible in corner. No surgical trainer, pegs, gauze, Penrose drain, sutures, graspers, or needle drivers present.
actionable_next_steps: Please provide video footage showing actual FLS task performance with visible trainer equipment and instrument manipulation.
